sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: HCA 헬스케어, 2026년 1분기 매출 191억 900만 달러로 전년 대비 증가, 희석 주당순이익 7.15달러 기록

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 191억 900만 달러로 전년 동기 183억 2,100만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
희석 주당순이익은 7.15달러로 전년 동기 6.45달러 대비 상승했고, 순이익은 16억 2,000만 달러였습니다.
동일시설 입원 건수는 0.9%, 동일시설 동등 입원 건수는 1.3% 증가했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 호흡기 관련 입원은 42%, 응급실 방문은 32% 감소했으며, 1월 동절기 폭풍도 일부 시장 물량에 부정적 영향을 주었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 경영진은 변동성 있는 환경에서도 동료들이 환자·지역사회·이해관계자를 위해 뛰어난 적응력을 보였다고 평가했습니다.
호흡기 관련 물량 감소는 일정 메디케이드 보충 프로그램 인식으로 상당 부분 상쇄됐습니다.
동일시설 응급실 방문 건수는 0.3% 증가했고, 동일시설 외래 수술 건수는 1.7% 늘었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA는 38억 200만 달러로 전년 동기 37억 3,300만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
순이익은 16억 2,000만 달러로 전년 동기 16억 1,000만 달러 대비 소폭 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 메디케이드 보충 프로그램 인식이 볼륨 헤드윈드를 상쇄했으나, 이 프로그램의 지속 가능성이 향후 실적의 핵심 변수입니다.
호흡기 시즌 약화 및 동절기 폭풍 등 외부 요인이 해소된 이후 기본 물량 추세를 확인하는 것이 중요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: increased 0.9 percent and same facility equivalent admissions increased 1.3 percent "The start of the year presented a dynamic environment for HCA Healthcare. I want to recognize our colleagues for continuing to demonstrate a remarkable ability to adapt to changing conditions and deliver for our patients, communities, and stakeholders,” said Sam Hazen, Chief Executive Officer of HCA Healthcare. Revenues in the first quarter of 2026 totaled $19.109 billion, compared to $18.321 billion in the first quarter of 2025. Net income attributable to HCA Healthcare, Inc. totaled $1.620 billion, or $7.15 per diluted  Normalized numeric aliases: $19.109 billion = 191억 900만 달러; $18.321 billion = 183억 2,100만 달러; $1.620 billion = 16억 2,000만 달러; $1.610 billion = 16억 1,000만 달러; $3.802 billion = 38억 200만 달러; $3.733 billion = 37억 3,300만 달러; $19.109 = 19.109달러; $18.321 = 18.321달러; $7.15 = 7.15달러; 0.9 percent = 0.9%; $1.610 = 1.610달러; $6.45 = 6.45달러; $3.802 = 3.802달러; $3.733 = 3.733달러; 1.3 percent = 1.3%.

are non-GAAP financial measures. A table providing supplemental information on these non-GAAP financial measures and reconciling GAAP measures of financial performance to them is included in this release. Same facility admissions increased 0.9 percent and same facility equivalent admissions increased 1.3 percent in the first quarter of 2026, compared to the prior year period. Same facility emergency room visits increased 0.3 percent in the first quarter of 2026, compared to the prior year period. Same facility inpatient surgeries declined 0.3 percent, and same facility outpatient surgeries declined 1.7 percent in the first quarter of 2026, compared to the same period of 2025. Same facility revenue per equivalent admission increased 3.1 percent in the first quarter of 2026, compared to the first quarter of 2025. 1 During the first quarter of 2026, the Company  Normalized numeric aliases: 0.9 percent = 0.9%; 1.3 percent = 1.3%; 0.3 percent = 0.3%; 1.7 percent = 1.7%; 3.1 percent = 3.1%.

seasonal volume increase, primarily due to respiratory activity. Respiratory-related admissions were down 42 percent, and respiratory-related emergency room visits were down 32 percent, compared to the first quarter of 2025. In addition, a winter storm in January negatively impacted first quarter volumes in certain of our markets. These unfavorable volume impacts were mostly offset by the recognition of certain Medicaid supplemental programs that were not included in the Company's initial 2026 guidance. Balance Sheet and Cash Flows from Operations As of March 31, 2026, HCA Healthcare, Inc.’s balance sheet reflected cash and cash equivalents of $940 million, total debt of $48.023 billion, and total assets of $61.450 billion.  Normalized numeric aliases: $940 million = 9억 4,000만 달러; $48.023 billion = 480억 2,300만 달러; $61.450 billion = 614억 5,000만 달러; $1.119 billion = 11억 1,900만 달러; $940 = 940달러; $48.023 = 48.023달러; $61.450 = 61.450달러; $1.119 = 1.119달러; 32 percent = 32%; 42 percent = 42%.
